Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ayana]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Ayana has sharp iron fingernails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Ayana is Shera's mentor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Ayana is a person Shera knows who was once viewed as a monster and a demanding stepmother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Shera has been spending too much time with Ayana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Ayana is a Gardener who advised avoiding fighting Soulbound at all costs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Ayana is the mentor for the Gardeners-in-training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Ayana uses a whistle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Ayana has pale pink eyes and a colorless face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Ayana is a member of the Council and a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Ayana is described as looking like a black-clad ghost with razor-sharp fingernails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — Ayana is not a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Ayana taught Shera lessons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — Ayana has a saying that trusting too easily is asking for a knife in the back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Ayana was doing paperwork.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Ayana is an older Gardener and is considered exceptional.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Ayana tried to instill certain instincts into Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Ayana has corpse-pale skin and hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Ayana has pinkish eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Ayana wears a black half-mask covering her mouth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Ayana has six-inch iron claws extending from her fingers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Ayana's voice is a grating rasp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Ayana is a Consultant with six-inch bladed fingernails and a ghostly complexion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Ayana was born to Imperial Guard parents and abandoned in the care of the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Ayana has claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Ayana has a bladed hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Ayana has Imperial Guard parents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Ayana taught Lucan that waiting is a skill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Ayana is a person who once gave Shera advice.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Ayana has a harsh, ghostly voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Ayana taught Shera that an enemy is always a potential ally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Ayana is one of Shera's Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Ayana has a horrible voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Ayana is someone Meia had to face as a girl when breaking rules.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Ayana is one of the people Shera cares about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Ayana is a Gardener who inherited Kameira blood from the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Ayana was wasted on Shera's attempt.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
